name: dotnet-build
description: Build .NET projects and solutions, surface structured errors/warnings, list solution projects, and restore NuGet packages.

tools.name: build_project
tools.description: Build a .NET project or solution and return structured errors and warnings.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects in a .sln solution file with their paths.

tools.name: restore_packages
tools.description: Restore NuGet packages for a project or solution.

tools.name: get_build_errors
tools.description: Build and return only the structured list of errors/warnings.
